name: Patricia G.
quote: My twins went together and it was the best decision we ever made. They still talk about their counselors by name months after camp ended.

name: James & Carol W.
quote: We were nervous sending our kids for the first time but the staff kept us updated and they settled in immediately. The 5:1 ratio really shows.

name: Tom H.
quote: My son struggled with shyness before camp. After two weeks he was leading his group. The leadership programs here are unlike anything I have seen.

name: Riley
quote: The summit hike on the last day was the hardest thing I have ever done, but also the best. I never thought I could make it but my counselors believed in me.

name: Cameron
quote: I learned how to start a fire and build a shelter. I felt like a real wilderness explorer. I cannot wait to come back next summer.

name: Priya N.
quote: Learning wilderness skills made me feel like I could take on anything. Maria is the best instructor — she made everything fun and exciting.
